name: AMC Robotics Corp
summary: PART I In this Annual Report on Form 10-K (the Form 10-K), references to the Company and to we, us, and our refer to AlphaVest Acquisition Corp. General AlphaVest Acquisition Corp is a blank check company incorporated on January 14, 2022, as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (a Business Combination).
